data.title: Kamala Harris: Benjamin Netanyahu influenced Donald Trump to engage in Iran war | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: In a speech at a Michigan event, Kamala Harris claimed Netanyahu pulled Trump into the Iran conflict, calling the Trump administration the "most corrupt" in US history.
data.keywords: Benjamin Netanyahu,Donald Trump,US military,Democrats,Trump Administration,midterm elections,Kamala Harris,Jeffrey Epstein,Epstein Files,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
